title: README table-of-contents anchors do not resolve
claim: REQ-008 requires no broken anchors/links, but README.md TOC links target missing double-hyphen anchors.
counterevidenceSought: Checked explicit ANCHOR comments and normalized heading slugs; found overview/quick-start style anchors and 1-overview style heading slugs, not 1--overview style targets.
alternativeExplanation: A non-GitHub renderer might emit double-hyphen slugs, but README.md:237 uses the single-hyphen #7-troubleshooting style, matching the heading slug pattern and contradicting the TOC style.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if the supported renderer is proven to resolve #1--overview style links or explicit matching anchors are added.

title: Feature catalog has substitution polish drift
reason: Duplicate `spec-doc record record` and residual abstract nouns are polish/maintainability issues; they do not contradict the four REQ-008 target paragraphs or frozen identifier checks.
